description_long: This stuffed toy features a large, round beige head with stitched details and a prominent red X mark above its left eye. The face has one large, expressive eye and a pink circular nose, giving it a quirky, slightly mischievous appearance. Its body is small and dressed in a black coat with gold buttons and a red vertical stripe, while the arms are outstretched and covered in a striped pattern. The toy has short, stubby legs that resemble tentacles, adding to its whimsical design. Visible stitching lines and patchwork details suggest a handmade or vintage aesthetic. The overall look is playful and slightly eerie, making it stand out as a unique urban toy.
description: A quirky stuffed toy with a large beige head, stitched details, a red X mark, and a black coat with gold buttons and a red stripe. Its outstretched arms and tentacle-like legs give it a whimsical, slightly eerie appearance.
description_view_0: Front view shows the toy's expressive face with one large eye, a pink nose, a red X mark, and its black coat with gold buttons and a red stripe.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the protruding snout-like nose and the side profile of the head, with visible stitching and the arm extended outward.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the back of the head with a red X mark, the plain black back of the coat, and the tentacle-like legs.
description_view_3: Right side view shows the side of the face with the large eye, the snout-like nose, and the gold buttons on the coat.
attribute_character_or_animal_represente: cartoon octopus doll with stitched face
attribute_facial_expression: The facial expression is quirky and slightly mischievous, with one large, wide-open eye and a pink circular nose. The red X mark and stitched lines add a playful, patched-up look.
attribute_pose_or_posture: Standing upright with arms outstretched to the sides and tentacle-like legs spread evenly beneath the body.
